---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# nmmMongo

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

`nmmMongo` provides a collection of helper functions for querying and updating the No More Marking MongoDB database. Functions are organised by collection: syllabuses, tasks, candidates, judges, decisions, schools, products, purchases, invoices, and more.

## Installation

```r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("NoMoreMarking/nmmMongo")
```

## Usage

All functions require a MongoDB connection string (`connStr`). Set this once and pass it to each function call.

```r
library(nmmMongo)

connStr <- "mongodb://..."
```

---

## Syllabus

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| `getSyllabusById(id, connStr)` | Get a syllabus by its id |
| `getSyllabusByName(name, connStr)` | Get a syllabus by name |
| `getSyllabusByProduct(product, connStr)` | Get all syllabuses for a product id |
| `setSyllabusReadyForJudging(syllabus, ready, connStr)` | Set or unset the ready-for-judging date on a syllabus |

---

## Tasks

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| `getTasks(taskName, connStr)` | Find tasks by name (regex match) |
| `getTaskById(id, connStr)` | Get a task by its id |
| `getTasksBySyllabus(syllabus, connStr)` | Get all tasks for a syllabus id |
| `getTasksByModCode(modCode, connStr)` | Get all tasks for a moderation code |
| `setModerationCode(task, modCode, connStr)` | Set the moderation code on a task |
| `updateSyllabus(task, syllabus, connStr)` | Set the syllabus for a task |
| `updateFromSyllabus(task, syllabus, connStr)` | Set the `fromSyllabus` field for a task |
| `updateScaling(task, uScale, uiMean, anchorScale, connStr)` | Set scaling factors for a task |
| `getScaling(task, connStr)` | Get scaling factors for a task |
| `updateAnchorProduct(task, productName, connStr)` | Set the anchor product for a task |
| `removeAnchorProduct(task, connStr)` | Remove the anchor product from a task |
| `updateDefaultJudgements(task, quota, connStr)` | Set the default judgement quota for a task |
| `updateShiftConstant(modTask, shiftConstant, connStr)` | Set the shift constant for a moderation task |

---

## Candidates / Persons

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| `getPersonsFromSyllabus(syllabus, connStr)` | Get all candidates for a syllabus |
| `getPersonsFromTask(task, mod, connStr)` | Get candidates from a local or moderation task |
| `setAsAnchor(firstName, lastName, modTask, theta, connStr)` | Set a candidate as an anchor in a moderation task |
| `unsetModAnchors(modTask, connStr)` | Unset all anchors in a moderation task |
| `updateMark(candidateId, mark, connStr)` | Update the mark for a candidate |
| `getWritingAgeSet(writingAgeSet, connStr)` | Get a writing age look-up table |

---

## Judges

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| `getJudges(taskId, modTask, connStr)` | Get judges for a local or moderation task |
| `getJudgesBySyllabus(syllabus, connStr)` | Get all judges across tasks in a syllabus |
| `excludeJudge(judge_id, modTask, connStr)` | Exclude a judge from a task |
| `excludeJudgeMod(judge_id, connStr)` | Exclude a judge from a moderation task |
| `resetModJudges(task, connStr)` | Re-include all excluded judges in a moderation task |
| `updateJudgeQuota(judge, quota, connStr)` | Update the quota for a judge |
| `getJudgeComments(tasks, connStr)` | Get judge comments for a vector of tasks |
| `getAudioTranscripts(tasks, connStr)` | Get audio transcripts for a vector of tasks |

---

## Decisions

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| `getDecisions(taskId, connStr)` | Get all decisions for a task, with judge and candidate details |
| `excludeDecision(decision, connStr)` | Exclude a single decision |
| `excludeDecisions(decisions, connStr)` | Exclude a vector of decisions |
| `resetDecisions(task, connStr)` | Re-include all excluded decisions for a task |
| `humaniseDecisions(task, connStr)` | Recode AI decisions as human decisions |
| `robotiseDecisions(task, connStr)` | Recode human decisions as AI decisions |

---

## Levels

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| `getLevels(task, connStr)` | Get the level boundaries for a task |
| `setLevels(task, boundaries, connStr)` | Replace the level boundaries for a task. `boundaries` must contain columns: `task`, `name`, `value`, `include`, `cutOff` |

---

## Schools & Trusts

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| `getSchoolByDfe(dfe, connStr)` | Get a school by its DfE number |
| `getSchoolsByTrust(trustName, productName, connStr)` | Get all school DfEs in a trust for a given product |
| `getTrusts(product, connStr)` | Get all trusts for a product |

---

## Products

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| `getProduct(id, connStr)` | Get a product by id |
| `getProductByName(name, connStr)` | Get a product by name |

---

## Purchases & Sales

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| `getPurchase(id, connStr)` | Get a purchase by id |
| `getPurchaseByProduct(id, connStr)` | Get purchases by product id |
| `getSales(product, connStr)` | Get all purchase records for a product |

---

## Invoices

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| `getInvoiceByNumber(invoice, connStr)` | Get an invoice by invoice number |
| `getInvoicesByDfe(dfe, connStr)` | Get all invoices for a DfE number |
| `createInvoice(dfe, product, purchase_id, no, connStr)` | Create a new invoice |

---

## Editor / Texts

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| `getEditor(task, connStr)` | Get editor content for candidates in a task |
| `getPersonTexts(ids, connStr)` | Get submitted text and word counts for a vector of candidate ids |

---

## Images

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| `getImages(task, connStr)` | Get image/scan page details for a task |

---

## Users

| Function | Description |
|---|---|
| `getUser(auth, connStr)` | Get user personal details from an auth0 string |
